etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = combines aspects of grass and phonetic cues -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(dá, "reply") combines the semantic element 艸 which suggests something related to plants, with the phonetic element 合 providing the pronunciation. It is used in the context of responding or replying, perhaps initially linked to a historical or contextual relevance with plants.
